queries.label: Latest stories
queries.description: View published Cuebook News Stories and sources for an asset.

queries.label: Story details
queries.description: Read a News Story's claims, sources, and timeline.

queries.label: Asset narratives
queries.description: View Cuebook's asset narrative library separately from News Stories.

queries.label: Market state
queries.description: View current price, market session, and snapshot time.

queries.label: News and evidence
queries.description: Search news, company announcements, regulatory filings, and independent reporting.

queries.label: Fundamentals and valuation
queries.description: Compare financial metrics and valuations on a consistent basis.

queries.label: Price and volume
queries.description: View OHLCV and relative-performance series with bar-finality status.

queries.label: Indicators and triggers
queries.description: Compute reproducible technical, relative-performance, and trigger metrics locally from finalized bars.

queries.label: Inspect a TradingView chart
queries.description: Inspect the creator's current local chart or run one bounded network research check without changing the chart.

queries.label: Focused TradingView chart
queries.description: Capture the latest decision structure at high information density while preserving axes, attribution, and the creator's original viewport.

queries.label: View settlement
queries.description: View observations, formula branches, and settlement results for a frozen viewpoint.

queries.label: Published Frame
queries.description: Read a release-pinned Frame, visual semantics, settlement state, and discussion entry point.

queries.label: Commentator research
queries.description: Study the sourcing, reasoning, and expression patterns of a public financial account.

queries.label: Media-format research
queries.description: Study structural patterns across articles, communities, visual posts, and short videos.
